name: Sweet Potato Pie with Bourbon Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the sweet potatoes together with melted margarine using a food processor or fork.
2. Blend in the eggs, sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
3. Add the milk and vanilla.
4. Pour the mixture into the baked pie shell.
5. Microwave on 70% (medium high) for 7 minutes.
6. Sprinkle pecans over the surface of the pie.
7. Rotate the pie and microwave on 70% (medium high) for an additional 6 to 8 minutes, or until the center no longer jiggles.
8. Top with Bourbon Cream Sauce.
